word: H3429 - יֹשֵׁב בַּשֶּׁבֶת - Yôshêb bash-Shebeth - yo-shabe' bash-sheh'-beth - That sat in the seat

sections.paragraph:
Original: ישׁב בּשּׁבת

Transliteration: yôshêb bashshebeth

Phonetic: yo-shabe' bash-sheh'-beth

BDB Definition:

Josheb-basshebeth = "dwelling in rest"
  1. one of David's mighty warriors

Origin: from the act. participle of H3427 and H7674, with a preposition and the article interposed

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
